headline: Semiconductor Momentum Surges on AI Capex, but Valuations Signal a Selective Rally
summary: The semiconductor rally is strong but selective, driven by AI spending. Key stocks like Micron, AMD, Lam Research, KLA, and Intel show momentum, but fundamentals vary widely. Best opportunities blend technical strength with attractive valuations.

headline: Citi lifts PTs on AMAT, LRCX, & KLAC amid booming WFE demand
summary: Investing.com -- Citi raised its price targets on the three major semiconductor equipment makers, lifting Applied Materials to $710 from $550, Lam Research to $450 from $315 and KLA Corporation to $290 from $206.40, after updating its forecasts for global wafer fab equipment (WFE) spending.

headline: Nasdaq Futures Climb as Chip Stocks Rebound Ahead of First Fed Decision Under Warsh
summary: June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.54% this morning, signaling a rebound from yesterday’s selloff, while investors await the first Federal Reserve rate decision under Kevin Warsh.

headline: 1 High-Flying Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Avoid
summary: Expensive stocks often command premium valuations because the market thinks their business models are exceptional. However, the downside is that high expectations are already baked into their prices, leaving little room for error if they stumble even slightly.

raw.headline: 1 High-Flying Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Avoid
